content:
When you use Pollux's Sacred Heart card first in a round, it goes into Ultra space with the same count as it had. 

For example if you use the card at 2/3 Exhaust, it goes into ultra space with 2/3. If you enter ultra turn directly after the card goes in, it retains the exhaust count. 

However, when you play any other card AFTER Sacred Heart goes into ultra space and BEFORE entering the ultra turn, the Sacred Heart resets to a 1/3 Exhaust version of the card instead. 

The pics attached show the sacred heart card resetting to 1/3 after playing a card.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Pollux's Sacred Heart Exhaust Count and Ultra Space

content:
I would love to see stat buffs on all units or none. Instead of just limited ones. One of the reasons I love this game is because of the viability and usefulness of standard banner units.

Basically every unit is good in some way with adequate investment. 

another reason I even play this game is character and wheel complexity. And with Light commenting about liking the jp design more. It being more streamlined and simpler. The buff does feel like it's here, to just make the game easier for people used to gacha games, and only using limiteds.
thread_title: About the limited stat buffs for 2nd aniv.
